prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Alzheimer's Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 18units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 49.9 kg; Height 162.1 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 251mg/dL; 9 months ago 224mg/dL; 6 months ago 214mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.7kg; 9 months ago 51.8kg; 6 months ago 48.8kg; 3 months ago 49.7kg; current 49.9kg), Height (12 months ago 162.1cm; 9 months ago 162.1cm; 6 months ago 162.1cm; 3 months ago 162.1cm; current 162.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 62U/L), AST (12 months ago 87U/L; 9 months ago 80U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 84U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 97mg/g; 9 months ago 127mg/g; 6 months ago 128mg/g; 3 months ago 122mg/g; current 104mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 189mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.45 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
